title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - ICRA - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
ICRA is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About ICRA:
ICRA is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA!
